title: Quick-Fix Nutty Almond Tartare
description: A quick-fix Mediterranean dish featuring nutty almond muffins and a dash-friendly broil for a tender mediterranean twist.

ingredients.name: Nutty Almond Butter
ingredients.notes: Optional for spreading or adding extra nuttiness

ingredients.name: Dashes of Olive Oil and Salt

instructions: Preheat your broiler to high heat.
Toast the almond muffins in a toaster oven or skillet until lightly golden brown, about 2 minutes per side.
Place toasted almond muffins on a plate and drizzle with balsamic vinegar. Add a few fresh herbs for freshness.
For an extra nutty flavor, spread some nutty almond butter evenly over the toasts.
Sprinkle salt on top and lightly brush with olive oil. Place under broiler for 30 seconds per side or until golden brown and bubbly.
Remove from oven and serve immediately.
